ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing standard (e.g., Generic, US) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing standard */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for country-specific standards */,
  "unit_system" TEXT /* Unit system used (e.g., Metric, Imperial) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sizing standard is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing standard the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "size_order" INTEGER /* Order of the size (e.g., 4, 6, 8) */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inches" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_cm" REAL /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_inches" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_inches" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "length_cm" REAL /* Length measurement in centimeters */,
  "length_inches" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES sizing_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the product corresponds to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Top, Bottom, Swimsuit) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
